narrative:
Newark 4-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,434 registered voters, with 64.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
